description_long: This rifle features a modern, angular design with a prominent rectangular upper rail and a boxy receiver. The body is predominantly black, with a matte finish that reduces glare. It has a detachable box magazine located beneath the receiver, and a straight, cylindrical barrel extending from the front. The trigger guard is integrated into the lower frame, and a secondary grip or support bar runs parallel beneath the main body. The rifle lacks visible iron sights or optics, suggesting a minimalist or modular approach. The overall construction appears robust, likely intended for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A sleek, black, modern rifle with a boxy receiver, detachable magazine, and a prominent upper rail, finished in matte black.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel and the rectangular profile of the upper rail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy receiver, detachable magazine, and the full length of the upper rail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver and the alignment of the upper rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, trigger guard, and the support bar beneath the main body.
